# CLAUDE.md — Crypt-RIPEMD160

## Build & Test

```bash
perl Makefile.PL
make
make test
```

## Generated Files — Do Not Edit

- **MANIFEST** — Generated by `make manifest` (via `ExtUtils::Manifest`).
  The sort order is meaningful and must not be changed manually.
  To update it, modify `MANIFEST.SKIP` as needed and re-run `make manifest`.

- **README.md** — Generated from the POD in `lib/Crypt/RIPEMD160.pm` via
  `pod2markdown` at release time. Do not edit `README.md` directly; update
  the POD in `RIPEMD160.pm` instead.

## Project Layout

- `lib/Crypt/RIPEMD160.pm` — Main module (Perl + POD documentation)
- `lib/Crypt/RIPEMD160/MAC.pm` — HMAC-RIPEMD160 implementation
- `RIPEMD160.xs` — XS bindings to the C implementation
- `rmd160.c` / `rmd160.h` — Core RIPEMD-160 C implementation
- `wrap_160.c` / `wrap_160.h` — C wrapper layer
- `t/` — Test suite
